youtube_mosaic_layout_mandate.v1_exhaustive: Flat list of logos (11 per row) using order_v1 and inline width:7%
youtube_mosaic_layout_mandate.v2_elite: Categorized neon-bordered card dashboard using order_v2 and width:48px

rules.manual: Assigned to all pre-existing entries and any new entries discovered by the V2 Optimizer from V1 Markdown source files (assumed manually added).
rules.automatic: Assigned to resources ingested automatically via curation workflows from X/Twitter, RSS, or GitHub trending.
